## Qaid v0.7.0 — Sebeeta table, finalized

The circular Sebeeta scoreboard is now the only view, redesigned around the dealer, plus numpad entry tweaks.

### Changed

- **The circular "table" is the only Sebeeta scoreboard** — the old list view and the List/Table toggle are removed. Sebeeta always shows the table.
- **The centre of the ring names the dealer** — the highest scorer (closest to busting the threshold, and the one who deals next). Before any round is recorded, the centre shows the target instead.
- **Two pills below the ring** call out each team's highest individual — the player each team has to watch. The team-total legend is gone (team totals don't matter in Sebeeta).
- **Numpad: taller buttons** to reduce misclicks during score entry.
- **Numpad in Arabic:** the Prev/Next nav buttons are flipped to the expected right-to-left order.

### State shape

The unused `sebeetaView` preference (added in v0.6.0) is removed. `cardScoreTracker_v1` stays legacy-compatible — the extra key in older saves is simply ignored.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 237/237 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds
- Dealer centre, team-top pills, numpad sizing, and the Arabic nav flip all verified live in light, dark, and RTL
